장생.name: 장생
장생.meaning_en: A time when new life is born — beginnings and fresh starts.
장생.personality: 낙관적이고 희망적. 새로운 시작에 대한 열정이 있으며 창조적인 에너지가 넘침.
장생.personality_en: Optimistic and hopeful. Full of creative energy and excitement for new beginnings.
장생.career: 새로운 사업 시작이나 창업에 유리. 성장 가능성이 높은 분야에서 능력 발휘.
장생.career_en: Favorable for starting a new business or venture. Talents shine in fields with strong growth potential.
장생.relationship: 새로운 인연을 만나기 좋음. 관계의 시작이 순탄하고 발전 가능성 높음.
장생.relationship_en: Good for meeting new people. Relationships begin smoothly and have strong potential to grow.
장생.health: 생명력이 강함. 회복력이 좋고 건강한 편이나 과욕 주의.
장생.health_en: Strong vitality. Good recovery and generally healthy, but watch for overexertion.
장생.advice: 새로운 도전을 두려워하지 말고 적극적으로 시작하세요.
장생.advice_en: Do not fear new challenges. Step forward and begin actively.

목욕.name: 목욕
목욕.meaning_en: A time of cleansing and growth — washing away the old to make room for the new.
목욕.personality: 감성적이고 예민함. 외부 영향을 받기 쉽고 유혹에 약한 면이 있음.
목욕.personality_en: Emotional and sensitive. Easily influenced by surroundings and somewhat vulnerable to temptation.
목욕.career: 예술, 서비스업에 적합. 유흥, 술, 물과 관련된 직업 인연. 변동 많음.
목욕.career_en: Suited for the arts and service industries. Drawn to work involving entertainment, beverages, or water. Expect frequent change.
목욕.relationship: 이성 관계에서 복잡함을 겪을 수 있음. 감정적 동요 주의.
목욕.relationship_en: Romantic relationships may become complicated. Watch for emotional turbulence.
목욕.health: 피부, 신장 계통 주의. 물과 관련된 사고 조심.
목욕.health_en: Take care of skin and kidney function. Be cautious around water-related accidents.
목욕.advice_en: Stay alert to temptation and work on your self-control.

관대.name: 관대
관대.meaning_en: A coming-of-age moment — stepping into adult responsibility and public identity.
관대.personality: 자존심 강하고 당당함. 사회적 지위와 명예를 중시하며 리더십이 있음.
관대.personality_en: Proud and self-assured. Values social standing and reputation, with a natural leadership streak.
관대.career: 공직, 관리직, 전문직에 적합. 사회적 인정을 받는 위치에서 성공.
관대.career_en: Well-suited for public service, management, or professional roles. Thrives in positions of social recognition.
관대.relationship: 체면을 중시해 관계가 형식적일 수 있음. 진정성 있는 교류 필요.
관대.relationship_en: Concern for appearances can make relationships feel formal. Aim for more genuine connection.
관대.health: 과도한 스트레스 주의. 정신적 긴장으로 인한 질환 조심.
관대.health_en: Watch for excessive stress. Be careful of illness stemming from mental tension.
관대.advice: 명예도 좋지만 실속을 챙기는 지혜도 필요합니다.
관대.advice_en: Reputation matters, but so does the wisdom to look after what is real and practical.

건록.name: 건록
건록.meaning_en: Entering one's prime — earning a stable position and the rewards that come with it.
건록.personality: 능력 있고 독립적. 자수성가형으로 실력으로 인정받으며 자기 주관 확고.
건록.personality_en: Capable and independent. A self-made type recognized on merit, with strong personal convictions.
건록.career: 어떤 분야든 성공 가능. 독립 사업, 전문직에서 특히 두각.
건록.career_en: Can succeed in any field. Especially strong in independent business or professional work.
건록.relationship: 독립심이 강해 관계에서 주도권을 잡으려 함. 양보 필요.
건록.relationship_en: Strong independence may push you to take the lead in relationships. Practice yielding when it helps.
건록.health: 건강한 편이나 과로 주의. 과신하지 말고 휴식 필요.
건록.health_en: Generally healthy, but watch for overwork. Do not overestimate your stamina — rest is needed.
건록.advice_en: Use your abilities fully, but never lose your humility.

제왕.name: 제왕
제왕.meaning_en: The peak of power — standing at the very top of one's strength.
제왕.personality: 카리스마 있고 지배적. 리더십이 강하고 큰 포부를 가지나 독선적일 수 있음.
제왕.personality_en: Charismatic and commanding. Strong leadership and large ambitions, but can become self-righteous.
제왕.career: 최고 자리에 오르는 능력. CEO, 정치인, 대기업 임원에 적합.
제왕.career_en: Capable of reaching the top. Suited for CEO, political, or executive roles in large organizations.
제왕.relationship: 지배적인 성향으로 갈등 가능. 상대방 존중 필요.
제왕.relationship_en: A dominating tendency may bring conflict. Make space to respect others.
제왕.health: 강건하나 과로, 스트레스로 갑작스러운 질환 주의.
제왕.health_en: Physically strong, but watch for sudden illness caused by overwork or stress.
제왕.advice: 정상에서는 내려올 일만 있으니 겸손과 나눔을 실천하세요.
제왕.advice_en: From the summit there is only the path down — practice humility and generosity.

쇠.name: 쇠
쇠.meaning: 기운이 쇠하기 시작 — 정점을 지나 부드러운 흐름으로 넘어가는 때
쇠.meaning_en: Energy begins to wane — a turn from peak toward gentler ground.
쇠.personality: 신중하고 보수적. 안정을 추구하며 모험을 꺼리는 성향.
쇠.personality_en: Careful and conservative. Seeks stability and tends to avoid risky moves.
쇠.career: 큰 변화보다 안정적인 직장이 유리. 현상 유지에 주력.
쇠.career_en: A steady job suits better than major change. Focus on maintaining what is already working.
쇠.relationship: 안정적인 관계 선호. 새로운 만남보다 기존 관계 유지.
쇠.relationship_en: Prefers stable relationships. Nurturing existing bonds matters more than new encounters.
쇠.health: 기력 저하 시작. 건강 관리에 신경 쓰고 무리하지 말기.
쇠.health_en: Energy begins to drop. Pay attention to health and avoid pushing too hard.
쇠.advice: 욕심을 줄이고 현재에 감사하며 내실을 다지세요.
쇠.advice_en: Trim back ambition, appreciate the present, and strengthen what you already have.

병.name: 병
병.meaning_en: Energy is weakened — a phase of vulnerability that calls for care.
병.personality: 소심하고 걱정 많음. 자신감이 부족하고 우유부단한 면이 있음.
병.personality_en: Timid and worry-prone. Lacking confidence and prone to indecision.
병.career: 큰 성취보다 안정이 중요. 무리한 사업 확장 금물.
병.career_en: Stability matters more than big wins. Do not stretch a business too far.
병.relationship: 의존적인 성향. 스스로 자립심을 기르는 노력 필요.
병.relationship_en: A dependent tendency. Make a conscious effort to build self-reliance.
병.health: 건강 문제 발생 가능. 정기 검진과 예방에 신경 쓰기.
병.health_en: Health issues may surface. Stay on top of regular check-ups and prevention.
병.advice: 건강이 최우선. 무리하지 말고 자기 관리에 집중하세요.
병.advice_en: Health comes first. Do not overdo it — focus on caring for yourself.

사.name: 사
사.meaning_en: The threshold between ending and new beginning — a turning point.
사.personality: 극적인 성격. 극단적 사고와 변화를 좋아하며 올인하는 타입.
사.personality_en: Dramatic in nature. Drawn to extremes and big change — an all-in kind of personality.
사.career: 기존 것의 마무리와 정리. 새로운 전환점을 위한 준비 시기.
사.career_en: A time for closing out and organizing what came before — preparing for the next pivot.
사.relationship: 관계의 끝과 시작이 교차. 이별 후 새 만남 가능.
사.relationship_en: Endings and beginnings overlap. A new connection often follows a parting.
사.health: 큰 병환 주의. 정밀 검사와 예방 필수.
사.health_en: Watch for serious illness. Thorough check-ups and prevention are essential.
사.advice: 끝이 있어야 새로운 시작이 있습니다. 집착을 버리세요.
사.advice_en: There is no new beginning without an ending. Let go of what you cling to.

묘.name: 묘
묘.meaning_en: A time of dormancy and quiet accumulation — energy gathered out of sight.
묘.personality: 내성적이고 깊은 사고. 비밀이 많고 내면 세계가 풍부함.
묘.personality_en: Introverted and deeply reflective. Keeps secrets and holds a rich inner world.
묘.career: 연구직, 종교, 철학 분야 적합. 드러나지 않는 곳에서 힘 발휘.
묘.career_en: Suited for research, religion, or philosophy. Power shows itself in less visible roles.
묘.relationship: 마음을 쉽게 열지 않음. 깊은 관계는 오래 지속.
묘.relationship_en: Slow to open up. Deep connections, once formed, tend to last.
묘.health: 만성 질환 주의. 숨은 병 발견을 위한 정기 검진.
묘.health_en: Watch for chronic conditions. Regular check-ups help catch hidden issues.
묘.advice_en: Build inner strength and wait for the right moment.

절.name: 절
절.meaning_en: A break that opens the way to renewal — what is cut off makes room for what is new.
절.personality: 고독하고 독특함. 주류와 다른 길을 가며 혁신적인 사고.
절.personality_en: Solitary and one-of-a-kind. Takes paths outside the mainstream with an innovative mind.
절.career: 기존 틀을 깨는 일에 적합. 예술, 발명, 혁신 분야.
절.career_en: Suited for work that breaks existing molds — art, invention, and innovation.
절.relationship: 인연이 끊어지기 쉬움. 관계 유지에 노력 필요.
절.relationship_en: Connections may be easily severed. Holding relationships together takes deliberate effort.
절.health: 급작스러운 건강 변화 주의. 사고 조심.
절.health_en: Watch for sudden shifts in health. Be cautious of accidents.
절.advice: 절망 속에서도 희망을 찾으세요. 끝은 곧 시작입니다.
절.advice_en: Find hope even in despair. Every ending is also a beginning.

태.name: 태
태.meaning_en: A time when new life is conceived — possibility still hidden, waiting to take shape.
태.personality: 순수하고 잠재력 풍부. 아직 드러나지 않은 가능성이 큼.
태.personality_en: Pure-hearted and full of latent potential. Much remains hidden, waiting to emerge.
태.career: 새로운 분야 학습, 준비 시기. 성급한 결정보다 공부에 집중.
태.career_en: A time for learning new fields and preparing. Focus on study rather than hasty decisions.
태.relationship: 새로운 인연의 씨앗. 아직은 조용히 발전시킬 때.
태.relationship_en: Seeds of new connections. For now, let them grow quietly.
태.health: 건강하지만 저항력 약함. 예방에 신경 쓰기.
태.health_en: Generally healthy but with low resistance. Take prevention seriously.
태.advice: 씨앗이 자라듯 천천히 성장하세요. 조급함은 금물.
태.advice_en: Grow slowly, the way a seed does. Impatience does not serve you here.

양.name: 양
양.meaning_en: A time of growing under care — receiving the support that allows you to develop.
양.personality: 온순하고 받아들이는 자세. 배우고 성장하는 것을 즐김.
양.personality_en: Gentle and receptive. Enjoys learning and growth.
양.career: 수련, 교육, 성장 과정에 있음. 귀인의 도움으로 발전.
양.career_en: In a phase of training, education, and development. Mentors and allies help you advance.
양.relationship: 보살핌을 받는 위치. 감사하는 마음으로 관계 유지.
양.relationship_en: You are in a position of being cared for. Hold relationships with a sense of gratitude.
양.health: 약하지만 점점 좋아짐. 영양 관리와 휴식 중요.
양.health_en: Currently fragile but improving. Good nutrition and rest matter.
양.advice_en: Do not let learning slip. Stay focused on your growth.

비견.name: 비견
비견.meaning: 나와 같은 존재 - 형제, 동료, 친구
비견.meaning_en: Someone equal to you — siblings, colleagues, friends.
비견.positive_en: Independence, autonomy, teamwork, healthy competitive drive.
비견.career: 동업, 팀워크 필요한 일, 경쟁 분야
비견.career_en: Partnerships, work that requires teamwork, competitive fields.
비견.relationship: 형제자매, 동료와의 관계 중요. 경쟁과 협력의 양면.
비견.relationship_en: Relationships with siblings and peers matter — they hold both competition and cooperation.

겁재.name: 겁재
겁재.meaning_en: A figure that pulls at what belongs to you — a rival peer.
겁재.positive_en: Drive, boldness, willingness to take on challenges.
겁재.negative_en: Financial loss, betrayal, gambling tendencies, conflict.
겁재.career_en: Speculative ventures, bold businesses, sports, sales.
겁재.relationship: 경쟁자와의 관계. 재물 관련 분쟁 주의.
겁재.relationship_en: Relationships with rivals come into play. Be careful of money-related disputes.

식신.name: 식신
식신.element_en: Element you produce, same yin-yang polarity
식신.meaning: 내가 낳은 것을 먹이는 존재 - 표현, 재능
식신.meaning_en: What you nurture and feed — your natural expression and talents.
식신.positive_en: Creativity, artistic sense, good fortune with food, warmth, vitality.
식신.career_en: Arts, cooking, education, service, creative work.
식신.relationship: 자녀, 제자, 아랫사람과의 관계. 돌봄과 표현.
식신.relationship_en: Relationships with children, students, and those you mentor — caretaking and self-expression.

상관.name: 상관
상관.element_en: Element you produce, opposite yin-yang polarity
상관.meaning: 관을 상하게 하는 존재 - 반항, 표현
상관.meaning_en: A force that pushes against authority — rebellion as creative voice.
상관.positive_en: Eloquence, creativity, artistic sensibility, a reformer's spirit.
상관.negative_en: Rebelliousness, official trouble, gossip, frequent job changes.
상관.career_en: Arts, criticism, law, media, freelance work.
상관.relationship: 권위에 반발. 상사와 갈등 가능. 자유로운 관계 선호.
상관.relationship_en: Resists authority. May clash with supervisors and prefers free, open relationships.

편재.name: 편재
편재.element_en: Element you control, same yin-yang polarity
편재.meaning_en: Money that moves — business, investment, opportunity-driven wealth.
편재.positive_en: Business instinct, wide social network, active drive.
편재.relationship: 아버지, 이성(남자 기준). 여러 인연과 교류.
편재.relationship_en: Relates to father; for a man, also romantic partners. Many varied connections.

정재.name: 정재
정재.element_en: Element you control, opposite yin-yang polarity
정재.meaning_en: Stable money — salary, savings, dependable income.
정재.negative_en: Stinginess, attachment to money, lack of flexibility.
정재.career_en: Salaried roles, civil service, finance, accounting.
정재.relationship_en: For a man, the spouse. Indicates a stable, dependable partner.

편관.name: 편관
편관.element_en: Element that controls you, same yin-yang polarity
편관.meaning_en: Pressure that becomes fuel — a force to be met and overcome, and turned into authority.
편관.relationship: 자녀(여자 기준), 권위적 인물. 긴장 관계.
편관.relationship_en: For a woman, indicates children; also points to authoritative figures and tense dynamics.

정관.name: 정관
정관.element_en: Element that controls you, opposite yin-yang polarity
정관.meaning_en: Proper authority — honor, position, recognized standing.
정관.negative_en: Inflexibility, rigidity, a sense of pressure.
정관.career_en: Civil service, public office, large companies, management.
정관.relationship_en: For a woman, the spouse; also supervisors and authority figures.

편인.name: 편인
편인.element_en: Element that produces you, same yin-yang polarity
편인.meaning_en: Off-the-beaten-path knowledge — specialized study and spirituality.
편인.positive_en: Inspiration, creativity, spiritual sensitivity, a research mind.
편인.negative_en: Dependence, low mood, disruption of natural expression, instability.
편인.relationship_en: Stepmother figures and teachers — unconventional but meaningful ties.

정인.name: 정인
정인.element_en: Element that produces you, opposite yin-yang polarity
정인.meaning_en: The proper seal — learning, study, the mother figure.
정인.career_en: Education, scholarship, religion, medicine, public service.
정인.relationship_en: Mother figures and teachers — a relationship of being cared for.

천을귀인.name: 천을귀인
천을귀인.meaning: 하늘이 내린 귀인. 어려울 때 도움을 주는 사람이 나타남.
천을귀인.meaning_en: A benefactor sent from heaven — someone shows up to help when things are hard.
천을귀인.effect: 귀인의 도움으로 위기 극복. 사회적 지위 상승. 관재 해소.
천을귀인.effect_en: Crises resolved through the help of a benefactor. Social standing rises and legal troubles ease.
천을귀인.advice: 귀인을 만나면 감사하게 대하고, 본인도 남에게 귀인이 되세요.
천을귀인.advice_en: When help arrives, receive it with gratitude — and become that kind of help for others in turn.

천덕귀인.name: 천덕귀인
천덕귀인.meaning: 하늘의 덕이 있는 귀인. 재앙을 피하고 복을 받음.
천덕귀인.meaning_en: A benefactor blessed with heavenly virtue — disaster is avoided and good fortune received.
천덕귀인.effect: 액운 해소, 건강 회복, 사고 방지.
천덕귀인.effect_en: Misfortune is dispelled, health recovers, accidents are prevented.
천덕귀인.advice_en: Do good for others and build up your store of fortune.

월덕귀인.name: 월덕귀인
월덕귀인.meaning: 달의 덕이 있는 귀인. 매월 복을 받음.
월덕귀인.meaning_en: A benefactor under the moon's virtue — blessings arrive month by month.
월덕귀인.effect: 액운 해소, 문서운 상승, 시험 합격.
월덕귀인.effect_en: Misfortune is cleared, luck with documents and contracts improves, and exams go well.

문창귀인.name: 문창귀인
문창귀인.meaning_en: An auspicious star of learning and the written word.
문창귀인.effect: 학업 성취, 시험 합격, 문서 처리 원활.
문창귀인.effect_en: Academic success, passing exams, smooth handling of documents.
문창귀인.advice_en: Focus on study and writing — results will follow.

학당귀인.name: 학당귀인
학당귀인.meaning_en: An auspicious star marking entry into the halls of learning.
학당귀인.effect: 학업 성취, 교육 분야 성공, 지식 습득.
학당귀인.effect_en: Academic accomplishment, success in education, deep absorption of knowledge.
학당귀인.advice_en: Do not let your learning slip.

역마.name: 역마
역마.meaning_en: A star of movement and change.
역마.effect: 이사, 출장, 여행이 많음. 해외 인연.
역마.effect_en: Frequent moves, business trips, travel — often including overseas ties.
역마.advice_en: Settling in one place is hard for you — learn to enjoy the change.

화개.name: 화개
화개.meaning_en: A splendid canopy — the star of art and the spiritual life.
화개.effect: 예술적 재능, 종교적 심성, 고독한 성향.
화개.effect_en: Artistic talent, a religious or contemplative bent, and a tendency toward solitude.
화개.advice_en: Look to art or the spiritual to find your peace of mind.

도화.name: 도화
도화.meaning_en: Peach blossom — a magnetic appeal that draws others in.
도화.effect: 이성에게 인기. 연예, 예술 분야 재능.
도화.effect_en: Popularity with romantic partners. Talent for entertainment and the arts.
도화.advice_en: Use your charm well, and stay alert to temptation.

장성.name: 장성
장성.meaning_en: The general's star — leadership and authority.
장성.effect: 지도자 자질, 군인/경찰 적성, 권위 획득.
장성.effect_en: Qualities of a leader, an aptitude for the military or police, and the ability to command authority.
장성.advice_en: Carry the responsibility that comes with leading.

금여.name: 금여
금여.meaning_en: A carriage of gold — wealth and honor.
금여.effect_en: Earning wealth and reputation, and meeting a good partner.
금여.advice_en: Enjoy your good fortune, but stay humble.

공망.name: 공망
공망.effect: 노력의 성과가 부족, 허무함, 기대 이하의 결과.
공망.effect_en: Effort yields less than expected — a sense of futility and underwhelming results.
공망.advice_en: Let go of inflated expectations and stay faithful to what is real in front of you.

양인.name: 양인
양인.meaning_en: A sharp blade — fierce, concentrated energy.
양인.effect: 결단력 있으나 사고, 수술, 분쟁 위험.
양인.effect_en: Decisive, but with risk of accidents, surgery, and conflict.
양인.advice_en: Temper your sharpness and grow your patience.

겁살.name: 겁살
겁살.meaning_en: A star of plunder — loss and risk.
겁살.effect_en: Financial loss, theft, risk of being deceived.
겁살.advice_en: Be careful with your finances and consider proper insurance.

망신살.name: 망신살
망신살.meaning_en: A force that can damage the self.
망신살.effect_en: Health problems, harm to reputation, official trouble.
망신살.advice_en: Look after your health and watch how you carry yourself.

원진살.name: 원진살
원진살.advice_en: Work to clear misunderstandings and make peace.

백호살.name: 백호살
백호살.meaning: 흰 호랑이의 기운. 강렬하고 폭발적인 에너지의 별.
백호살.meaning_en: The white tiger's current — fierce, high-voltage energy.
백호살.effect: 강하게 부딪히는 기운이라 안전·건강에 한 번씩 주의를 두면 좋아요.
백호살.effect_en: A forceful, high-impact energy — worth staying mindful about safety and health.
백호살.advice_en: Avoid risky activities and put safety first.

괴강살.name: 괴강살
괴강살.meaning: 별들의 우두머리 기운. 극강하고 결단력 있는 별.
괴강살.meaning_en: The chief of the stars — an extreme, fiercely decisive current of energy.
괴강살.effect: 강한 결단력과 카리스마. 고독하거나 극단으로 치우칠 수 있어 조율이 필요해요.
괴강살.effect_en: Powerful decisiveness and charisma — sometimes with a streak of loneliness and a pull toward extremes that's worth keeping in check.
괴강살.advice_en: Use your strong energy in the right direction.

천라지망.name: 천라지망
천라지망.meaning_en: Caught in the net of heaven and earth — restricted on all sides.
천라지망.advice_en: Follow the rules and stay on the straight path.

태극귀인.name: 태극귀인
태극귀인.meaning: 처음과 끝을 두루 돕는 귀인. 큰 위기를 비껴가고 학문·명예의 복을 받아요.
태극귀인.meaning_en: A benefactor that helps from start to finish — steering you clear of disaster and bringing fortune in learning and standing.
태극귀인.effect: 깊은 통찰과 학문적 재능이 있고, 고비마다 도움의 손길이 닿아요.
태극귀인.effect_en: Deep insight and a gift for learning, with help arriving at the critical moments.
태극귀인.advice: 직관을 믿고 본질을 탐구하는 흐름을 따라가 보세요.
태극귀인.advice_en: Trust your intuition and follow the pull toward what feels essential.

천주귀인.name: 천주귀인
천주귀인.meaning: 하늘의 곳간이 열린 듯한 풍요의 귀인.
천주귀인.meaning_en: A benefactor of plenty — as if a heavenly granary has been opened to you.
천주귀인.effect: 먹을 복과 재물 복이 따라오는 모습이에요. 평생 굶주릴 일이 적은 사람이에요.
천주귀인.effect_en: A steady flow of food and material comfort — someone who rarely lacks for the basics.
천주귀인.advice: 받은 풍요를 주변과 나누면 복이 더 커져요.
천주귀인.advice_en: Share what you've received — the abundance only grows when it's passed on.

천관귀인.name: 천관귀인
천관귀인.meaning_en: A benefactor that opens doors to office and recognition.
천관귀인.effect: 공직, 조직 생활, 사회적 자리에서 인정받는 흐름.
천관귀인.effect_en: Recognition in public roles, organizations, and positions of responsibility.
천관귀인.advice: 맡은 자리를 무겁게 여기고 공정하게 처신하세요.
천관귀인.advice_en: Treat your position seriously and act with fairness.

복성귀인.name: 복성귀인
복성귀인.meaning_en: A benefactor lit by the star of fortune.
복성귀인.effect: 고비마다 작은 행운이 따라오는 느낌이에요. 위태로운 순간이 부드럽게 풀려요.
복성귀인.effect_en: Small lucky breaks appear at the turning points — tight moments tend to ease themselves.
복성귀인.advice: 행운에 기대기보다, 행운이 왔을 때 준비된 사람이 되세요.
복성귀인.advice_en: Don't lean on luck — make sure you're ready when it shows up.

문창.name: 문창
문창.meaning_en: The star where words and learning shine.
문창.effect: 문서, 시험, 글쓰기, 창작에서 두각을 보이는 흐름.
문창.effect_en: Standing out in paperwork, exams, writing, and creative work.
문창.advice: 읽고 쓰는 흐름을 일상에 두면 재능이 더 살아나요.
문창.advice_en: Keep reading and writing as part of your routine — the talent grows when used.

문곡.name: 문곡
문곡.meaning_en: The star of artistic expression and refined craft.
문곡.effect: 예술, 음악, 문학적 감각이 도드라지는 스타일이에요.
문곡.effect_en: A noticeable touch in the arts, music, and literary work.
문곡.advice: 감성을 표현할 수 있는 채널을 하나쯤 가지세요.
문곡.advice_en: Keep at least one channel where your sensibility can come out.

금여성.name: 금여성
금여성.meaning_en: The golden carriage — abundance and a good match in love.
금여성.effect: 안락한 생활과 좋은 배우자가 따라오는 모습이에요. 외모와 품격이 받쳐주는 사람이에요.
금여성.effect_en: Comfort in daily life and a good partner — someone whose looks and bearing carry them.
금여성.advice_en: Don't settle into the comfort — keep some effort flowing alongside it.

천문성.name: 천문성
천문성.meaning: 하늘의 문이 열린 별. 통찰과 직관.
천문성.meaning_en: The gate of heaven swung open — insight and intuition.
천문성.effect: 깊이 있는 통찰력과 보이지 않는 것을 읽는 감. 종교, 철학, 심리에 끌리는 느낌이에요.
천문성.effect_en: A sense for what's beneath the surface — pulled toward spirituality, philosophy, or the psychological.
천문성.advice: 직관을 신뢰하되, 검증하는 습관도 함께 두세요.
천문성.advice_en: Trust the intuition — but build a habit of checking it too.

천의성.name: 천의성
천의성.meaning_en: A healer sent from heaven — the star of healing.
천의성.effect: 의료, 상담, 돌봄 분야에 잘 맞는 스타일이에요. 남을 낫게 하는 손이 있는 사람이에요.
천의성.effect_en: A natural fit for healthcare, counseling, and caregiving — hands that help others get better.
천의성.advice: 남을 돕는 일에 마음을 두면 본인의 길도 함께 열려요.
천의성.advice_en: Lean into helping others — your own path opens alongside theirs.

암록.name: 암록
암록.meaning_en: A quiet, hidden current of good fortune.
암록.effect: 위기 때마다 보이지 않는 도움이 들어오는 모습이에요. 뒤에서 받쳐주는 사람이 있는 흐름이에요.
암록.effect_en: Quiet support arrives just when you need it — someone is often backing you up from behind the scenes.
암록.advice: 받은 도움을 가벼이 여기지 말고 기억해 두세요.
암록.advice_en: Don't take the help lightly — remember who showed up for you.

건록.name: 건록
건록.meaning_en: Standing on your own and settling into your own place.
건록.effect: 자수성가, 독립적인 자리, 안정된 직장 운이 따라오는 느낌이에요.
건록.effect_en: Self-made footing, an independent role, stable working life.
건록.advice: 남에게 기대기보다 본인의 힘으로 키워가는 흐름이 잘 맞아요.
건록.advice_en: Builds best on your own steam — leaning on others isn't your style.

임관.name: 임관
임관.meaning: 관직에 임하는 흐름. 건록과 같은 단계의 다른 이름.
임관.meaning_en: Stepping into office — the orthodox name for the Established Stipend (建祿) stage.
임관.effect: 사회적으로 자리 잡고 능력을 인정받는 스타일이에요.
임관.effect_en: Finding your place in the wider world and getting credit for what you can do.
임관.advice_en: Carry the responsibility that comes with the role.

제왕.name: 제왕
제왕.effect: 강한 자신감과 추진력. 리더 자리에 잘 어울리는 사람이에요.
제왕.effect_en: Strong confidence and drive — well-suited to leading.
제왕.advice: 정점에 있을 때일수록 겸손과 다음 흐름을 살피세요.
제왕.advice_en: At the peak, lean into humility and start watching for what comes next.

망신.name: 망신
망신.meaning_en: A current where face is lost and damage shows up.
망신.effect: 실수, 구설, 명예 훼손, 재물 손실이 따라올 수 있는 모습이에요.
망신.effect_en: Slip-ups, gossip, reputation hits, and material loss can show up.
망신.advice: 말과 행동을 조심하고, 욕심을 잠시 내려 두세요.
망신.advice_en: Watch what you say and do, and set your greed aside for a while.

원진.name: 원진
원진.meaning: 이유 없이 미운 감정이 일어나는 흐름.
원진.meaning_en: A pull of dislike that arises without a clear reason.
원진.effect: 가까운 사람과 자꾸 어긋나고 오해가 쌓이는 느낌이에요.
원진.effect_en: Repeated mismatches and stacked-up misunderstandings with the people closest to you.
원진.advice_en: Clear feelings as they come up — don't let them sit.

백호.name: 백호
백호.meaning: 흰 호랑이의 기운. 강렬하고 폭발적인 에너지의 별.
백호.meaning_en: The white tiger's current — fierce, high-voltage energy.
백호.effect: 강하게 부딪히는 기운이라 안전·건강에 한 번씩 주의를 두면 좋아요.
백호.effect_en: A forceful, high-impact energy — worth staying mindful about safety and health.
백호.advice: 위험한 활동을 줄이고 안전을 우선에 두세요.
백호.advice_en: Cut back on risky activities and put safety first.

괴강.name: 괴강
괴강.meaning: 별들의 우두머리 기운. 극강하고 결단력 있는 별.
괴강.meaning_en: The chief of the stars — an extreme, fiercely decisive current.
괴강.effect: 강한 결단력과 카리스마가 있지만, 고집과 극단으로 흐를 수도 있는 모습이에요.
괴강.effect_en: Powerful decisiveness and charisma — but can tip into stubbornness or extremes.
괴강.advice: 강한 힘을 좋은 방향으로 쓰는 연습을 하세요.
괴강.advice_en: Practice pointing that strong force in a good direction.

홍염살.name: 홍염살
홍염살.meaning_en: A star of bright, flushed attractiveness.
홍염살.effect: 이성에게 강한 매력을 발산하는 느낌이에요. 인기와 동시에 구설이 따라올 수 있어요.
홍염살.effect_en: A magnetic pull on others — popularity, but rumors can ride along with it.
홍염살.advice: 매력을 의식하되, 관계의 선을 분명히 두세요.
홍염살.advice_en: Be aware of the charm — and keep the lines in your relationships clear.

귀문관.name: 귀문관
귀문관.meaning: 영적인 문이 열리는 별. 예민함과 직관.
귀문관.meaning_en: A spirit gate cracked open — sharpness of feeling and intuition.
귀문관.effect: 예민하고 직관적이지만, 신경이 곤두서고 불안에 흔들리기 쉬운 스타일이에요.
귀문관.effect_en: Sensitive and intuitive — but the nerves stay on edge and anxiety can take over.
귀문관.advice: 충분한 휴식과 정신적 안정에 시간을 들이세요.
귀문관.advice_en: Make real time for rest and mental settling.

현침.name: 현침
현침.meaning: 뾰족한 침이 매달린 듯한 날카로운 기운.
현침.meaning_en: Sharp energy — like a needle hanging in the air.
현침.effect: 예리하고 분석적이지만, 말이 날카로워 상처를 줄 수 있는 모습이에요.
현침.effect_en: Sharp and analytical — but words can cut and leave a mark.
현침.advice: 말의 날을 한 번 더 다듬고 내보내세요.
현침.advice_en: Soften the edge of your words once before they go out.

고신.name: 고신
고신.meaning_en: A current that leaves you on your own.
고신.effect: 결혼이 늦거나 사람과 거리를 두기 쉬운 느낌이에요. 혼자만의 시간이 많아져요.
고신.effect_en: Marriage may come late, and distance from people is easy — more solitary time than most.
고신.advice: 고독을 두려워하지 말고 나만의 깊이를 키우는 시간으로 쓰세요.
고신.advice_en: Don't fear the solitude — use it to grow a depth that's yours.

재살.name: 재살
재살.effect: 사고, 질병, 갑작스러운 손실이 올 수 있는 스타일이에요.
재살.effect_en: Accidents, illness, and sudden losses can show up.
재살.advice: 안전과 건강 관리를 미리 챙기고 무리한 일은 피하세요.
재살.advice_en: Stay ahead on safety and health, and don't take on too much.

천살.name: 천살
천살.meaning: 하늘이 내리는 시련의 별. 사람의 힘 밖의 일.
천살.meaning_en: A trial sent from heaven — beyond what human effort can control.
천살.effect: 자연재해, 큰 변동, 사람 손 밖의 사건이 올 수 있는 모습이에요.
천살.effect_en: Natural events, large shifts, situations outside your control can arrive.
천살.advice: 받아들이고 흐름을 살피며, 마음을 단단히 두세요.
천살.advice_en: Accept what comes, watch the current, and hold steady inside.

월살.name: 월살
월살.meaning_en: A star where energy thins out and wilts.
월살.effect: 의욕 저하, 정체, 일이 풀리지 않는 느낌이에요.
월살.effect_en: Lowered drive, things stalling, work that just won't loosen up.
월살.advice_en: Take it as a resting season — don't push.

년살.name: 년살
년살.meaning: 도화 계열의 별. 매력과 인기의 흐름.
년살.meaning_en: A peach-blossom relative — charm and popularity.
년살.effect: 주목을 받는 스타일이에요. 인기와 동시에 구설이 따라올 수 있어요.
년살.effect_en: You draw attention — popularity, with the gossip that sometimes rides with it.
년살.advice: 매력을 좋은 결과로 연결하는 데 신경 쓰세요.
년살.advice_en: Channel the charm toward something that actually pays off.

지살.name: 지살
지살.meaning_en: A star that moves the ground — relocation and travel.
지살.effect: 이사, 출장, 환경 변화가 잦은 모습이에요.
지살.effect_en: Frequent moves, business trips, and changes of setting.
지살.advice: 변화 자체를 자원으로 보고 적극 활용하세요.
지살.advice_en: Treat the change itself as a resource and put it to use.

육해.name: 육해
육해.meaning_en: A star carrying six kinds of harm.
육해.effect: 건강, 인간관계, 일에서 자잘한 손실과 마찰이 따라오는 느낌이에요.
육해.effect_en: Small losses and friction in health, relationships, and work.
육해.advice: 큰 문제로 키우지 말고 작을 때 정리하세요.
육해.advice_en: Handle it while it's small — don't let it grow.

반안.name: 반안
반안.meaning_en: Climbing into the saddle — promotion and rising position.
반안.advice_en: The higher you rise, the more you hold on to where you started.

삼재.name: 삼재
삼재.meaning_en: A three-year stretch when three kinds of trouble can come at once.
삼재.effect: 건강, 인간관계, 재물에 변동과 시련이 따라올 수 있는 느낌이에요.
삼재.effect_en: Shifts and trials in health, relationships, and money can show up.
삼재.advice: 큰 결정과 무리한 시작은 피하고 안정을 우선에 두세요.
삼재.advice_en: Skip the big decisions and risky launches — put stability first.

목.nature_en: Growth and development; benevolence; spring; the east.
목.personality_en: Kind-hearted and growth-oriented. Creative and forward-moving.
목.excess: 고집, 분노, 화를 잘 냄, 독단적
목.deficiency_en: Indecision, low confidence, lack of drive.
목.health: 간, 담, 눈, 힘줄 관련 질환 주의
목.health_en: Watch for issues with the liver, gallbladder, eyes, and tendons.

화.nature_en: Radiance and passion; propriety; summer; the south.
화.personality: 열정적이고 활발함. 예의 바르고 표현력 좋음.
화.personality_en: Passionate and lively. Polite and expressive.
화.deficiency_en: Low energy, depression, difficulty expressing yourself.
화.health: 심장, 소장, 혀, 혈액 관련 주의
화.health_en: Watch for issues with the heart, small intestine, tongue, and blood.
화.career_en: Arts, entertainment, advertising, electronics, food and beverage.

토.nature: 중재, 안정, 신, 사계절 환절기, 중앙
토.nature_en: Mediation and stability; faithfulness; the transitions between seasons; the center.
토.personality: 신뢰감 있고 안정적. 중재 능력 좋음.
토.personality_en: Trustworthy and grounded. A good mediator.
토.excess_en: Stubbornness, a stifling rigidity, lack of flexibility.
토.health: 비장, 위장, 피부, 근육 관련 주의
토.health_en: Watch for issues with the spleen, stomach, skin, and muscles.
토.career_en: Real estate, agriculture, construction, finance, brokerage.

금.nature_en: Harvest and gathering; righteousness; autumn; the west.
금.personality: 의리 있고 결단력 있음. 정의감 강함.
금.personality_en: Loyal and decisive, with a strong sense of justice.
금.excess_en: Coldness, harshness, an overly critical edge.
금.health: 폐, 대장, 코, 피부, 호흡기 주의
금.health_en: Watch for issues with the lungs, large intestine, nose, skin, and respiratory system.
금.career_en: Finance, steel, machinery, law, military and police work.

수.nature_en: Wisdom and flexibility; knowledge; winter; the north.
수.personality: 지혜롭고 유연함. 적응력 좋고 깊은 사고.
수.personality_en: Wise and flexible. Adaptable and deep-thinking.
수.deficiency: 용기 부족, 지혜 부족, 적응력 부족
수.deficiency_en: Lack of courage, lack of wisdom, weak adaptability.
수.health: 신장, 방광, 귀, 뼈 관련 주의
수.health_en: Watch for issues with the kidneys, bladder, ears, and bones.
수.career_en: Fisheries, distribution, tourism, IT, service industries.
